title: The Song That Reminded Me of You
content: While driving home after work, Grace heard a familiar song on the radio. It was the same one she and Ben had danced to during their first vacation together. The music instantly brought back memories of seaside walks, late-night conversations, and laughter that seemed impossible to forget. Without thinking, she sent Ben a message asking if he remembered the song. He replied with a photo of the old playlist they had created years earlier. They spent the evening sharing memories and promising to create many new ones. Some melodies never truly belong to a singer; they belong to the people who lived through them together.
